site.title: Gus McEwan Photography — Photographer in Copenhagen & London
site.description: Gus McEwan is a portrait, editorial and fine art photographer based between Copenhagen and London. Available for commissions across Denmark, the UK and worldwide.

people.title: People
people.description: Portrait photography by Gus McEwan — editorial portraits, weddings and personal commissions shot in Copenhagen, London and on location worldwide.

places.title: Places
places.description: Architecture and travel photography from Copenhagen, London, Paris, Scotland and beyond — by Copenhagen-based photographer Gus McEwan.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Wildlife and nature photography by Gus McEwan — landscapes, animals and quiet moments captured with a documentary eye.

about.title: About & Contact
about.description: About photographer Gus McEwan — based between Copenhagen and London. Get in touch to commission portraits, editorial, wedding or travel photography.

shop.title: Shop
shop.description: Buy fine art prints and digital downloads by Gus McEwan — a selected collection of portrait, landscape and travel photography from Copenhagen, London and beyond.

about.bio1: Gus McEwan is a photographer based between Copenhagen and London.
about.bio2: His work spans people, places, and the natural world — drawn to natural light, stillness, and the space between moments.
about.bio3: Through his lens, he invites you to pause, feel, and remember.
about.contactIntro: Let's create something together. Drop me a line. Ask a question. Or just say hi.

shop.licensePersonalDesc: Home printing, framing, gifts and personal social media. Not for commercial purposes.
shop.licenseEditorialDesc: Personal use plus editorial and small commercial work: blogs, magazines, books and self-published materials — up to 5,000 copies.
shop.licenseCommercialDesc: Editorial use plus advertising, marketing campaigns, packaging and large print runs — up to 500,000 copies.
shop.licenseFullCommercialDesc: All rights, including merchandise for resale, unlimited print runs and white-label use.

licensing.title: Licensing Terms & Usage Rights
licensing.intro: By purchasing and downloading any digital file from this site, you agree to the following terms. This is a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the purchased digital image file strictly as outlined below. All rights not expressly granted remain with Gus McEwan Photography.
licensing.s1Personal1: Permitted for personal, non-commercial purposes only (e.g. printing for your home, personal social media posts, personal gifts).
licensing.s1Personal2: Maximum resolution: as specified on the product page.
licensing.s1Personal3: No commercial use, no resale, no public display for business purposes.
licensing.s1Editorial1: Permitted for editorial, news, documentary, or educational purposes.
licensing.s1Editorial2: Maximum number of copies/reproductions: as stated on the product page (e.g. up to 5,000).
licensing.s1Editorial3: Includes use in books, magazines, websites, blogs, and social media when the primary purpose is informational or documentary.
licensing.s1Editorial4: Credit line "© Gus McEwan" is appreciated but not required.
licensing.s1Commercial1: Permitted for commercial purposes with the copy limit stated on the product page (e.g. up to 500,000 reproductions).
licensing.s1Commercial2: Includes advertising, marketing materials, websites, packaging, and promotional use.
licensing.s1Commercial3: The image may be used as part of a larger design or layout.
licensing.s1Full1: Unlimited reproductions and full commercial rights worldwide.
licensing.s1Full2: Includes all rights granted in the Commercial tier plus the ability to use the image without copy restrictions.
licensing.s1Full3: Suitable for large-scale campaigns, products, or resale of derivative works (subject to the restrictions below).
licensing.s1RawNote: RAW files are available on request for an additional fee and are subject to separate terms.
licensing.s2Intro: The following restrictions apply to all license tiers. You may not:
licensing.s2_1: Resell, redistribute, or sublicense the digital file itself (or any high-resolution version) in any form.
licensing.s2_2: Use the image in any defamatory, illegal, pornographic, or misleading context, or in a way that could harm the reputation of any person depicted.
licensing.s2_3: Use the image to imply endorsement of any product, service, or opinion by any person shown in the photograph unless separate written permission has been obtained.
licensing.s2_4: Remove or alter any embedded metadata, watermarks, or copyright information.
licensing.s2_5: Claim copyright or authorship of the image.
licensing.s3_1: Many images on this site were captured at public events in public spaces. While photography at such events is generally permitted, the use of images featuring identifiable individuals may be subject to personality rights, privacy laws, or right-of-publicity rules in your jurisdiction.
licensing.s3_2: You are responsible for ensuring that your intended use complies with all applicable local laws regarding the rights of any people depicted. This license does not grant you permission to use any person's likeness in a manner that violates their personality or privacy rights.
licensing.s4_1: Files are delivered as high-quality digital downloads (JPEG or 16-bit TIFF as specified).
licensing.s4_2: You are responsible for backing up your purchased files. Replacement downloads are available for a limited period after purchase — please contact us if you lose access.
licensing.s4_3: Colour profiles and technical specifications are as described on each product page.
licensing.s5_1: The images are provided "as is." While every effort is made to deliver high-quality files, Gus McEwan Photography makes no warranties regarding fitness for a particular purpose beyond the license granted. Liability is limited to the purchase price of the license.
licensing.s6_1: These terms are governed by the laws of Denmark. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Denmark.
licensing.s7_1: For custom licensing, bulk purchases, extended rights, or RAW file requests, please get in touch:
licensing.s7Thanks: Thank you for supporting independent photography.
